# Contributing

Thanks for your interest in contributing to the EM Interview Field Guide.

## What We're Looking For

- Real interview experiences (anonymized company data welcome)
- Corrections to existing content (wrong links, outdated info, typos)
- New resources for the [awesome list](../awesome.md)
- Additional interview questions with sources
- Career transition stories and advice

## How to Contribute

1. Fork this repo
2. Create a branch (`git checkout -b add-interview-experience`)
3. Make your changes following the [styling guide](../STYLING.md)
4. Open a pull request with a clear description

## Content Guidelines

- Back claims with data or sources. Link to the original source.
- Write in first person for personal experiences. Use direct, concrete language.
- Follow the formatting rules in [STYLING.md](../STYLING.md) - no bold, no italic, no horizontal rules, no ALL CAPS.
- Use percentages with one decimal place (69.4%, not 69%).
- Keep content practical. This is a field guide, not a textbook.

## What Not to Submit

- AI-generated filler without real data backing
- Self-promotional content (your own course, coaching service, etc.)
- Content without sources or citations

## Questions?

Open an issue and we'll respond within a few days.
